name: Black Bean Soup#1
recipeIngredient: 6 Quart Chicken broth OR 3 Bouillon cubes and 6 qt of water
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash black beans, cover with water and allow to soak overnight; rinse; drain; set aside.
2. Pour oil into a large soup pot. Add bacon, ham, onion, garlic, and celery. Cook at high simmer until vegetables are soft, about 30 minutes.
3. Add beans, rice, seasonings, and broth to the soup pot. Bring to boil; reduce heat, cover, and simmer 2 1/2-3 hours.
4. Let soup cool; put through a blender a little at a time until smooth.
5. Return to soup pot; reheat on low about 45 minutes, adding wine and sherry.
6. Ladle into bowls.
